candidate: L23 VIOP single-stock-futures FUNDING-BASIS cross-sectional factor (REAL DATA; pre-registered, measurement-only). A GENUINELY NEW factor AXIS: the per-stock futures-IMPLIED funding/borrow basis = the annualized premium of a name's nearest single-stock-future settlement over its raw spot. Distinct from every prior track: L1-L17 price/volume/fundamental/sentiment, L18 index-basis feasibility-block, L19 short-sale intensity, L20 foreign-flow, L21 single-stock-futures OPEN-INTEREST GROWTH (a positioning FLOW), L22 BIST30 index-futures TERM-STRUCTURE (index-level, spot-data-blocked). L23 is the per-stock futures BASIS LEVEL (carry/funding/borrow), the natural complement to L22's blocked index basis -- and crucially the SPOT leg IS available offline per stock (raw close), unlike the index. Enabled by the VIOP day-end archive (data/bist_datastore_archive/viop, VIOP_GUNSONU_FIYATHACIM monthly CSVs) SETTLEMENT PRICE (col7) + segment SSF, joined to per-stock raw spot close. Repo READ-ONLY (writes only under lab-demo-goal/), NO network, ASCII.

feasibility_PRECHECK.probe: A read-only feasibility probe (since deleted, so verify_lab stays clean) parsed SSF settlement, picked the front contract (smallest days-to-expiry >= MIN_DTE_DAYS), and computed basis_ann = ln(front_settle / spot_raw)/(dte/365) on exact-date spot match. Result over 2019-01..2026-05: 89 month-ends, median 47 underlyings with a spot match per month (min 29, max 51), 3906 basis observations. Basis_ann distribution p10=0.078 p25=0.179 median=0.292 p75=0.382 p90=0.455; 93.9% positive (contango). The thinnest early-2019 month dips to 29 (just below the 30-name floor -> that month is skipped by MIN_NAMES); from ~2021 the cross-section is comfortably >= 40.
feasibility_PRECHECK.decision: FEASIBLE as a real cross-sectional test (the spot leg that blocked L22 at the index level IS present per stock). The median basis ~0.29/yr is close to the contemporaneous Turkish risk-free (TLREF) carry r, NOT a dividend yield (BIST div yields ~0.02-0.05), confirming the LEVEL is dominated by funding-carry, while the CROSS-SECTIONAL spread around it is the per-name funding/borrow/positioning signal under test.
feasibility_PRECHECK.min_names_floor_note: MIN_NAMES = 30; months below the floor are skipped. Most months clear it.

data_provenance.futures_leg_PRESENT: data/bist_datastore_archive/viop/VIOP_GUNSONU_FIYATHACIM.M.YYYYMM.csv -- day-end VIOP report, semicolon-delimited, latin-1, TWO header rows. Columns (0-indexed): col0=TARIH(date YYYY-MM-DD), col1=SOZLESME KODU (instrument series, single-stock future F_<TICKER><MMYY> e.g. F_AKBNK0526), col3=PAZAR SEGMENTI (SSF = single-stock futures), col6=DAYANAK VARLIK (underlying e.g. AKBNK.E), col7=UZLASMA FIYATI (SETTLEMENT PRICE). Expiry month/year = the trailing 4 digits of the series code (MM, YY); expiry day approximated as the last calendar day of that month. Uncompressed plain VIOP_GUNSONU files (111) cover 2017-03..2026-05; the AS-variant files (VIOP_AS_GUNSONU, 72) are a separate dataset and are NOT used.
data_provenance.spot_leg_PRESENT_offline: data/clean_universe/adjusted_prices_2019_2026.parquet [date,symbol,close,value_tl,adjusted_close,...]. RAW close (col 'close') is the basis denominator (settlement vs cash on the SAME day); adjusted_close gives the forward TOTAL return; value_tl gives the trailing-63d liquidity filter. Unlike the BIST30 index in L22, the per-stock cash level IS available offline -> the clean basis test is RUNNABLE here.
data_provenance.overlap_window: VIOP SSF months intersect the price panel = 2019-01 .. 2026-05 (~89 usable month-ends). Forward return needs the next month, so the last signal month is ~2026-04.
data_provenance.symbol_join: strip trailing .E from the VIOP underlying (col6) to match bare spot tickers; basis joins futures settlement to raw spot close on the SAME observation date (the month's last trading day).

hypothesis: The single-stock-futures funding-basis embeds per-name funding cost, securities-borrow/short-sale frictions, and directional positioning. Cross-sectionally, a name whose future trades at an ABNORMALLY RICH basis (high premium over spot, beyond the common carry) reflects crowded longs / costly-or-constrained shorting / over-eager positioning, and is therefore OVERPRICED -> subsequently UNDERperforms; a name at a LOW (or backwardated) basis is relatively cheap -> OUTperforms. PRE-REGISTERED NEGATIVE SIGN (high basis -> lower forward return). DEPLOYABLE form: LONG the LOW-basis tercile in the LIQUID spot universe, market-relative, net of realistic cost; significant and regime-stable. GENUINELY NEW axis (per-stock derivatives FUNDING-BASIS LEVEL), not in the L1-L22 set.

signal_FROZEN.definition: basis_ann(symbol, month-end m) = ln(F_front.settle(m) / S_raw_close(m)) / (dte_front / 365.0), where F_front is that underlying's SSF contract with the SMALLEST days-to-expiry that is still >= MIN_DTE_DAYS (avoids expiry microstructure), F_front.settle is col7, S_raw_close is the raw spot close (col 'close') on the SAME last trading day m, and dte_front is days from m to the front contract's expiry (last calendar day of its MMYY month). Cross-sectional rank into terciles each month (rank-based -> robust to basis outliers; NO winsorization parameter). SINGLE pre-registered signal definition (NO alternative normalizations / NO grid -> no multiple testing).
signal_FROZEN.sign_convention: LOW basis (cheap future / relative backwardation) = LONG leg; HIGH basis (rich future / crowded) = SHORT leg. Corroboration L-S = mean(LOW tercile) - mean(HIGH tercile). This encodes the pre-registered NEGATIVE basis->return sign: the favorable (long) leg is the LOW-basis tercile.
signal_FROZEN.new_axis: per-stock futures-implied FUNDING/BORROW BASIS LEVEL -> orthogonal to price/volume/fundamental/sentiment/short/foreign-flow (L1-L20), to single-stock-futures OPEN-INTEREST GROWTH (L21, a flow), and to the index-level term-structure (L22). Not derivable from spot price or fundamentals alone (requires the per-stock derivatives settlement).

look_ahead_safety_FROZEN.primary: basis from month-end m -> forward SPOT return over month m+1 (position formed at end of m). Both the futures settlement and the spot close are end-of-day PUBLIC data known at month-end m -> m+1 is unambiguously look-ahead-safe.
look_ahead_safety_FROZEN.robustness: SKIP-MONTH variant: basis month m -> forward return over month m+2. Extra-conservative; report BOTH; sign/significance disagreement is itself a finding.
look_ahead_safety_FROZEN.return_def: adjusted_close(end of forward month) / adjusted_close(end of entry month) - 1, only when the forward month directly follows the prior available month (no calendar gap); market-relative = minus the EW mean forward return over the same-scope universe that month (carry-immune: the common carry/level drops out of a market-relative cross-sectional spread).

universe_FROZEN.all: all SSF underlyings with a valid basis that month (>= MIN_NAMES).
universe_FROZEN.liquid: >= 1.0e7 TL trailing-63-trading-day median daily SPOT value_tl at the signal month-end (D-205 absolute threshold, reused).

portfolio_FROZEN.primary_gate: LIQUID LOW-basis tercile, EW long, market-relative net of cost
portfolio_FROZEN.corroboration: L-S spread (LOW minus HIGH tercile), and ALL-scope versions

cost_FROZEN: Realistic round-trip per D-207/D-208 liquid range; charge round_trip_bps * monthly turnover of the long basket. round_trip_bps frozen at 40 (liquid mid-range). Report gross, net, realized turnover, breakeven_cost_bps.

stats_FROZEN.nw_t: Newey-West HAC t (lag 6) on the monthly market-relative active-return series

confounds_PRE_DECLARED.dividend_calendar: An imminent ex-dividend depresses the futures basis (the future is priced ex the cash dividend the holder forgoes). BIST cash dividends cluster in Q2 (Apr-Jun), so the LOW-basis tercile may be partly a pre-ex-dividend SEASONAL set rather than a funding/crowding signal. This is a known confound and is the leading alternative explanation if any LOW>HIGH spread appears; recorded, not corrected (no dividend-overlay tuning = no grid).
confounds_PRE_DECLARED.common_carry_level: The basis LEVEL is dominated by the common TL funding-carry (~0.29/yr median), which is NOT cross-sectional; the tercile RANK removes the common component, isolating the per-name spread. Market-relative returns further strip the common move.
confounds_PRE_DECLARED.thin_cross_section: ~47 names/month (29-51) is a THIN, concentrated cross-section -> tercile means are noisy; expect wide t-stats and possible regime instability.
confounds_PRE_DECLARED.roll_seasonality: Front-contract selection (>= MIN_DTE_DAYS) shifts the maturity used near each expiry, adding roll seasonality to the dte and hence the annualization; the >=10-day floor mitigates expiry microstructure but does not remove maturity drift.

keep_bar_FROZEN: Deploy-edge <=> LIQUID LOW-basis tercile market-relative NET mean > 0 AND |NW-t| >= 2.0 AND regime-sign-stable, net of cost. Else VIOP-SS-BASIS-XS-NOT-TRADEABLE -- no deployable edge. Two-way verdict like D-205/D-209/L19/L20/L21: TRADEABLE-EDGE -> deploy-candidate for Cagan review; else clean-archive.
two_sided_law: Only the pre-registered NEGATIVE basis->return sign counts (LOW-basis tercile OUTperforms). A significant OPPOSITE-sign result (LOW-basis UNDERperforms / HIGH-basis outperforms = basis momentum / rich-future continuation) is NOT the pre-registered edge -> NOT-TRADEABLE; it would be logged as an opposite-sign finding for a SEPARATE future pre-registered track, never claimed here (anti p-hacking).

honest_expectation_DECLARED_BEFORE_RESUL.summary: Prior is WEAK. For: the futures-basis/cost-of-carry cross-section is a recognized source of return predictability in deeper futures markets (the basis embeds funding/borrow/positioning frictions a stock-overpricing story would predict to revert). Against: (a) the basis LEVEL is overwhelmingly common TL carry (median ~0.29/yr); the residual per-name SPREAD that the tercile isolates is small and noisy in a ~47-name market; (b) the dividend-calendar confound contaminates the LOW-basis leg seasonally (Q2); (c) thin, concentrated SSF cross-section -> high t-stat variance and likely regime instability across the 2022 break; (d) any contemporaneous basis<->return co-move is removed by the look-ahead-safe m+1 design, which may wash the signal out. Most likely a significance-wall, a dividend-seasonal artifact, or regime-sign-instability. NO celebration expected; record whatever the result. If it DOES clear the keep-bar it is a genuine deploy-candidate to surface to Cagan, not to bury.
honest_expectation_DECLARED_BEFORE_RESUL.most_likely_verdict: VIOP-SS-BASIS-XS-NOT-TRADEABLE (significance-wall, dividend-calendar artifact, or regime sign-instability); no deployable edge.
